# Pull Request Review

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## People Protection Review

Check all that apply:

- [ ] This change affects access, eligibility, membership, entitlement routing, moderation, payments, identity, partner workflows, AI behavior, public trust copy, or user-facing governance.
- [ ] This change does not materially affect people, access, monetization, identity, or governance.

## Required Checks

- [ ] Human dignity preserved.
- [ ] No discriminatory targeting introduced.
- [ ] No exploitative monetization introduced.
- [ ] No hidden pricing, cancellation, or benefit language introduced.
- [ ] No final adverse automated decision without human review.
- [ ] Appeal or escalation path exists where people are materially affected.
- [ ] Vendor dependencies are mapped where applicable.
- [ ] Data collection is limited to operational necessity.
- [ ] Rollback or remediation path exists.
- [ ] Public copy is clear where applicable.

## Partner / Vendor Impact

List any vendor, platform, API, payment provider, identity provider, community system, AI system, or infrastructure provider affected by this change.

If none, write `None`.

## Evidence

Add relevant issue, checklist, audit note, screenshot, test result, or deployment evidence.

## Reviewer Notes

Add any governance, security, operational, or launch concerns.
